text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following our big win, Biwa Hayahide and I meet to devise a plan of
attack for our next race.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
With these values, we can make a prediction for the upcoming race.
Now I'd like to review our data on the other runners.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The key to the previous problem was racer number four, yes? We will
refer to the data of her past three races, and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As usual, her theories are so advanced that I can barely keep up. I
furiously scratch into my notebook to make sure I don't get left
behind.

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, check it out. Hayahide's talking about some super-complicated
stuff.

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
Wow, for real. As expected from one of our school's top brains. She's
really extraordinary... Out of our league, for sure.

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
How'd she get so smart though? Maybe if I study harder, I can be like
that too.

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
No way—she's one of those people who were just born that way! We
could never be like her.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: "Extraordinary," huh?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh... It's nothing. Let's continue with the meeting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, for the rest of the discussion, Hayahide occasionally looks
like she's got something else on her mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Even after leaving the cafeteria, she seems lost in thought.
choice_data_list:
Thinking about what those students said
earlier?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ah... Actually, no. My apologies. It's nothing.
choice_data_list: Come on, give me a try.
Come on, give me a try.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It... it just feels strange being described as "extraordinary." That word infers that I'm special.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I always endeavor to follow logic, so from the outside, I may appear
to be doing difficult things...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But I'm actually an average person—one who had no other tools but
reason to get into the academy.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
So I'm not worthy of such praise as "extraordinary." It is much better
suited for someone with natural talent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm sure by natural talent, she must be referring to the Beast, Narita Brian.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may have complicated feelings about her exceptional sibling that
others wouldn't understand. But even so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She works tirelessly on developing her unique strength. So I tell her
straight-out what an amazing person she is.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Thank you...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I'll sharpen my ability even further, and together we'll
make it through this battle. My determination remains firm.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But you know, Trainer. As her big sister... what I really wanted was to
outperform her.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm embarrassed at myself for foolishly chasing something as
unattainable as natural talent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she looks off into the distance, I can sense a lack of
self-confidence in her eyes. I see that within her cool-headed self
also lies fragility.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I'm sorry for droning on about such a dull subject... Anyway, it's
not on our schedule, but I'd like to incorporate what we drew from the
meeting into training.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Making corrections later will only slow us down, so let's verify the
formula first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide's driven to keep moving forward, and I feel compelled
myself to find a way to give her confidence.
